prompt_en: Cinematic Korean apocalypse opening for CH14 해무 변전소. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. Location mood: 해무 해안로, 스위치야드, 변전소 제어벙커. Show route pressure, practical survival gear, and incoming threat 변압수. Grounded realism, no fantasy.
prompt_ko_context: 어느 라인을 살리고 어느 라인을 포기할지 결정한다.
camera_notes: wider negative space, slower pans, distance before impact. Start wide, move into corridor pressure, end on route decision beat.
audio_notes: Base cue echo_base. Layer alarm pulses, crowd pressure ambience, and metallic reverb.
